QCOM.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
QCOM.summary: Shares of wireless chipmaker Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after President Trump announced Apple had agreed to design and manufacture chips with Intel in the United States, a foundry validation the market had been waiting on for over a year.

AAPL.title: Intel Jumps 9% After Trump Signals Apple Chip Tie-Up
AAPL.summary: Intel shares rose after Trump said Apple agreed to work with the chipmaker on US-designed and built chips.
